last_verdict: Almost — score 6.5/10 with 'two attack regimes' framing promoted from failure to mechanistic finding. Reviewer sets final experiment: DAVIS-10 with always-hi-fi vs gated-hi-fi (hi-fi only when NOT is_natural_distractor). Paper framing must be regime-aware Pareto, NOT universal fidelity fix.

r1_pilot_A_hard_clamp_3clip.verdict: cows collapsed - hard clamp removes global adversarial field

r2_pilot_B_inpaint_f_prev_3clip.verdict: inpaint restores redirect signal but does not help attack; rejected

r3_pilot_C_spatial_eps_3clip.verdict: eps_outside=2/255 does not rescue cows - attack needs full 8/255 budget frame-wide

round_summary.r3_mechanism_finding: two_attack_regimes: appearance-paste (non-distractor, hi-fi helps) vs distractor-hijack (natural-distractor, needs distributed perturbation)
